$description: DRAFT — captured from components/ui/dialog.tsx. Not consumed at runtime yet (Phase 4).

mobileInset.$description: Viewport clamp: max-w-[calc(100%-2rem)] = 1rem inset per side.

dialog.$comment: REMOVED 2026-07-13: the footer had a bg-muted/50 band with a top rule and a bleed past the content padding. That band's only job is to separate actions from CONTENT THAT SCROLLS — most dialogs are short, so it was drawing a divider that divided nothing and made one box read as two stacked cards. shadcn's own footer carries no surface; this kit had added it. The footer is now just the actions.
